mapper.sql: SELECT s.id AS s_id, s.session_date AS s_session_date, s.start_time AS s_start_time, s.status AS s_status, s.created_by AS s_created_by, s.cancel_reason AS s_cancel_reason, s.reminder_sent AS s_reminder_sent, s.created_at AS s_created_at, t.id AS t_id, t.session_id AS t_session_id, t.table_number AS t_table_number, r.id AS r_id, r.session_id AS r_session_id, r.table_id AS r_table_id, r.line_user_id AS r_line_user_id, r.guest_count AS r_guest_count, r.status AS r_status, r.cancelled_by AS r_cancelled_by, r.cancel_note AS r_cancel_note, r.created_at AS r_created_at, r.updated_at AS r_updated_at, u.display_name AS u_display_name FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN mahjong_tables t ON t.session_id = s.id LEFT JOIN reservations r ON r.table_id = t.id AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' LEFT JOIN users u ON u.line_user_id = r.line_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sessions (session_date, start_time, created_by) VALUES (#{sessionDate}, #{startTime}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sessions SET start_time = #{startTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sessions SET reminder_sent = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.line_user_id FROM reservations r WHERE r.session_id = #{sessionId} AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED'
